description: A fintech design system for banking and personal-finance interfaces. Clean, trustworthy, data-dense.
source: mock (stands in for Figma REST extraction)

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary interactive control. Used to trigger actions like submit, confirm, pay.

components.name: TextInput
components.description: Single-line text entry. Used for names, references, search.

components.name: AmountInput
components.description: Specialised numeric input for currency values, with a currency prefix. Used in payment and transfer flows.

components.name: Card
components.description: Container that groups related content with elevation. Used for account summaries, transaction groups.

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Displays a single key metric with a label, value, and optional trend indicator. Used on dashboards for balances, spend, growth.

components.name: Select
components.description: Dropdown for choosing one option from a list. Used for account selection, categories, filters.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Binary on/off switch. Used for settings, opt-ins, feature flags.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small status label. Used to show transaction status (pending, cleared, failed) or account type.

components.name: TransactionRow
components.description: A single line in a transaction list: merchant, date, amount, status badge. Used in statements and activity feeds.

components.name: ConfirmSheet
components.description: A confirmation surface for consequential actions, showing a summary and confirm/cancel controls. Used before executing a payment or transfer. Its internal structure (summary rows, fee disclosure, confirm control) is fixed and must not be recomposed from primitives.
